name: friday-fusion
description: Friday Fusion realtime team activities app

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w web
scripts.test: npm run test -w server && npm run test -w web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w server && npm run lint -w web
